creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
i'll probably have to patch all the ports locally and then hide libssh similarly in DragonFly (same as libedit, same as ncurses)

That's being said, while you're covered by the letter of the law on 9.2 isn't supporting, using features not available in all F9 releases isn't a great policy.  It's not conservative to depend on private (but as you said, legally you are clear)
